symptom_vector: Pod killed, forceful pod termination, container killed, pod eviction

expert_knowledge.root_cause_desc: Component [paymentservice] experienced [pod_processes] fault, accompanied by [client_error, client_error_ratio, error, error_ratio, request, response] anomalies.
reasoning_chain: Step 1: Check Metadata - Confirm faulty component is [paymentservice] (From Ground Truth instance field)
Step 2: Check Observation - Found keyword [pod_processes] in Metric data showing abnormal drop from 1.0 to 0.0 (From GT key_observations)
Step 3: Derive Root Cause - Based on pod_processes termination feature, determined cause is [pod_processes] fault (From Ground Truth key_metrics)

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Value drops from 1.0 to 0.0 during fault window (22:10:13Z to 22:10:14Z)
critical_checks.instruction: Check if metric [pod_processes] for paymentservice shows abrupt termination (1.0→0.0)
